es.gob.fnmt.dniedroid.gui

Class PasswordUI

  • java.lang.Object
    • es.gob.fnmt.dniedroid.gui.InternalUI
      • es.gob.fnmt.dniedroid.gui.PasswordUI
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    DialogUIHandler

    public final class PasswordUI
extends InternalUI
implements DialogUIHandler
    Internal dialog to manage de password of the keystore.

        public int showConfirmDialog(java.lang.String message)
        Description copied from interface: DialogUIHandler
        Show the dialog requesting user confirmation.
        Specified by:
        showConfirmDialog in interface DialogUIHandler
        Parameters:
        message - message to show.
        Returns:
        0 if user accepts or 1 if not.

      • showPasswordDialog

        public char[] showPasswordDialog(int retries)
        Description copied from interface: DialogUIHandler
        Show the dialog requesting the password.
        Specified by:
        showPasswordDialog in interface DialogUIHandler
        Parameters:
        retries - number of retries left.
        Returns:
        the password.

      • setPasswordDialog

        public static void setPasswordDialog(DialogUIHandler passwordDialog)
        Set the dialog that will be shown in the PIN request.
        Parameters:
        passwordDialog - instance of the class that implements DialogUIHandler interface.
